prompt: A screenshot-style composition of an AI image generation chat interface on a light gray app background, centered inside a rounded white panel with a soft drop shadow. Near the top is a large pale mint-green chat bubble containing a long Chinese prompt in black sans-serif text, describing a hand-drawn food map of Chengdu. Beneath it, aligned slightly left of center, is a square illustrated map image with rounded corners. The map is a whimsical hand-painted tourist food map titled in large Chinese calligraphy at the upper left: {argument name="headline text" default="成都! 吃货暴走地图"}. The subject is {argument name="city name" default="Chengdu"}, presented as a vintage hand-drawn local cuisine map with warm beige paper texture, watercolor ink outlines, and a playful artisanal travel-poster feel. The map shows simplified streets, landmarks, and district labels in Chinese, not geographically exact, but cute and decorative. Place exactly 12 featured food locations, each marked with a numbered red dot and a small Chinese label, each paired with a detailed illustrated dish. Include 12 dishes total: 1) a bowl of skewers in red chili broth, 2) a bowl of sweet water noodles, 3) rabbit head specialty, 4) guokui or stuffed baked flatbread, 5) hot pot, 6) maocai, 7) dan dan noodles, 8) hongyou chaoshou or chili oil wontons, 9) bobo chicken, 10) fuqi feipian, 11) a spicy stir-fried dish, 12) another classic Chengdu snack platter. Add a few Chengdu landmarks sketched in miniature around the roads, including a pagoda-like tower, traditional gate architecture, modern city buildings, and a central emblematic structure. Frame the entire map with a decorative border made of red chili peppers, green vines, and small leaves. Use a warm color palette dominated by chili red, mustard yellow, olive green, tea brown, and muted jade. In the lower right corner of the map, include a small legend box labeled {argument name="legend title" default="图例说明"} with 4 legend items, each with a tiny icon and Chinese text, plus a compass rose with N, E, S, W. Add many handwritten-style Chinese road names and annotations throughout. Outside the image, the interface includes small gray action icons beneath the green chat bubble on the right, a page indicator reading 2/2, an Edit pill button overlapping the lower left of the map image, a circular download/share button at the lower right of the image, and a sparse bottom toolbar with 4 small reaction/action icons. Overall look: clean modern chat UI presenting a generated square illustration, with the map as the visual focus.
translatedPrompt: 一种截图风格的 AI 图像生成聊天界面构图，背景为浅灰色应用界面，中心是一个带有柔和投影的圆角白色面板。顶部附近是一个巨大的淡薄荷绿聊天气泡，其中包含一段黑色的无衬线中文字符串，描述了一张成都手绘美食地图。在其下方，略微偏左对齐的是一张带有圆角的方形插画地图。该地图是一张充满童趣的手绘旅游美食地图，左上角有醒目的中文书法标题：{argument name="headline text" default="成都! 吃货暴走地图"}。主题为 {argument name="city name" default="成都"}，呈现为复古手绘风格的当地美食地图，具有温暖的米色纸张质感、水彩墨水轮廓以及俏皮的手工旅行海报感。地图展示了简化的街道、地标和中文区域标签，不追求地理精确，但显得可爱且具有装饰性。放置 12 个特色美食点，每个点都标有红色数字圆点和小型中文标签，并配有详细的菜品插画。共包含 12 道菜：1) 一碗红油串串，2) 一碗甜水面，3) 特色兔头，4) 锅盔或夹馅烤饼，5) 火锅，6) 冒菜，7) 担担面，8) 红油抄手，9) 钵钵鸡，10) 夫妻肺片，11) 一道香辣炒菜，12) 另一款经典成都小吃拼盘。在道路周围零星点缀一些成都地标的微缩素描，包括塔状建筑、传统门楼、现代城市建筑以及一个核心标志性结构。用由红辣椒、绿藤和嫩叶组成的装饰性边框环绕整张地图。使用以辣椒红、芥末黄、橄榄绿、茶褐色和柔和玉色为主的暖色调。在地图右下角，包含一个标有 {argument name="legend title" default="图例说明"} 的小型图例框，内含 4 个图例项，每一项都有微型图标和中文文字，外加一个带有 N、E、S、W 的指南针。在地图各处添加许多手写风格的中文路名和注释。在图像外部，界面包括绿色聊天气泡右下方的灰色操作小图标、显示为 2/2 的页面指示器、覆盖在地图图像左下方的“编辑”胶囊按钮、图像右下角的圆形下载/分享按钮，以及底部一个简洁的工具栏，包含 4 个反应/操作小图标。整体外观：简洁现代的聊天 UI，展示生成的方形插画，并以地图作为视觉焦点。

breakdown.creativeCore: 成都手绘美食地图 UI：此提示词可生成类似截图的 AI 聊天界面，展示一张趣味十足的成都手绘美食地图，适用于重现 gpt-image-2 输出的社交媒体演示效果。
breakdown.subject: 界面
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；包含标注/说明
breakdown.bestUse: 城市美食地图、活动导览、园区地图、旅行视觉
breakdown.whySelected: 得分 81；构图: centered, annotations；风格: vintage, watercolor, hand-drawn；要求精确文字；包含标注/说明

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 信息图/图解 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, annotations]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: vintage, watercolor, hand-drawn]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
